episodes.title: Esther Arunga: The Cult, The Husband, and The Tragedy
episodes.description:
In this video, we uncover the chilling story of Esther Arunga—from her reign as the queen of KTN News to her tragic involvement with the Finger of God Church and her controversial husband, Quincy Timberlake.

For years, the world watched in shock as a brilliant legal mind and media icon spiraled into a world of "prophets," legal battles, and a heartbreaking family tragedy in Australia. We break down the timeline of her downfall, the influence of Joseph Hellon, and the unanswered questions surrounding the death of her son, Sinclair.

#kenyanews #kenya #nairobi
